mission: Map TypeScript type conventions and patterns — FINAL with all 5 subagents integrated
scope: 28 packages, all tsconfigs, all linter configs, .opencode/tools, sdks/vscode

strict_mode.verdict: All 28 packages use `strict: true` (12 explicit, 16 via @tsconfig/bun or @tsconfig/node22). `useUnknownInCatchVariables` defaults to true — unannotated catch vars are `unknown`.

base_configs.@tsconfig/bun: strict: true, target: ESNext, module: ESNext, moduleResolution: bundler, lib: [ESNext]. Used by: opencode, core, llm, slack, script, http-recorder, containers.
base_configs.@tsconfig/node22: strict: true, target: ES2022, module: Node16, lib: [ES2022]. Used by: plugin, sdk/js, function, console/core, console/function, console/resource, stats/core, stats/server, ui, storybook.

explicit_unknown_correct.pattern: 5 app/src instances use identical `err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)` + toast. 2 opencode instances re-wrap in new Error with context.

high_risk: opencode/src/session/llm.ts:143 — wraps at line 367 but uses any

utilities: opencode/src/util/filesystem.ts:63 — isEnoent(e: unknown): e is { code: 'ENOENT' }

examples: bus/index.ts:54 — `callback: (event: Payload<D>) => unknown` — typed generic
bus/index.ts:56 — `subscribeAllCallback: (callback: (event: any) => unknown)` — wildcard uses any
bus/global.ts:11 — EventEmitter<{ event: [GlobalEvent] }> with typed listener array
agent/machine/types.ts:168 — `spawn: (machineId, laneId, mission: any) => Effect.Effect<string>` — mission uses any
agent/machine/runtime.ts:168 — `onComplete: (state: MachineState) => Effect.Effect<void>`
agent/authority.ts:108-119 — Authority contract callbacks: `() => Effect.Effect<AuthorityContract>`, `(condition) => Effect.Effect<void, StopConditionTriggeredError>`
storage/db.ts:99 — `callback: (trx: TxOrDb) => T` — where Transaction = any (debt)
storage/adapter.ts:41 — `transaction: <T>(fn: (tx: DrizzleLikeClient) => T | Promise<T>, options?) => Promise<T>`
storage/adapter.ts:73 — Effect adapter: `fn: (client: any) => Effect.Effect<T, any, any>` — client uses any
storage/storage.ts:55 — `update: <T>(key, fn: (draft: T) => void) => Effect.Effect<T, Error>` — mutable draft
provider/auth.ts:96 — `callback: (input: { providerID: ProviderID } & CallbackInput) => Effect.Effect<void, Error>`
plugin/openai/ws.ts:22-27 — WebSocket stream: `onFirstEvent?: () => void`, `onComplete?: (event: Record<string, unknown>) => void`, `onRetryableTerminal?: (event) => Promise<WebSocket | undefined>`
provider/provider.ts:49 — SSE: `new Promise<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof reader.read>>>((resolve, reject) => ...)`
session/llm/ai-sdk.ts:6-7 — AI SDK event type: `type AISDKEvent = Result['fullStream'] extends AsyncIterable<infer T> ? T : never`
pty/pty.ts:20 — `onData(listener: (data: string) => void): Disp`
pty/pty.ts:21 — `onExit(listener: (event: Exit) => void): Disp`
util/rpc.ts:62 — `on<Data>(event: string, handler: (data: Data) => void)`
effect/bridge.ts:13 — `bind: <Args extends readonly unknown[], Result>(fn: (...args: Args) => Result) => (...args: Args) => Result`
file/watcher.ts:99 — `const cb: ParcelWatcher.SubscribeCallback = bridge.bind((err, evts) => ...)`
cli/effect-cmd.ts:50 — `handler: (args: WithDoubleDash<Args>) => Effect.Effect<A, CliError, AppServices | InstanceStore.Service>`

general_conventions.return_type: `unknown` preferred over `void` for discarded values. `Effect.Effect<A, E, R>` for effectful callbacks.
general_conventions.any_usage: Only wildcard bus, CLI handlers, machine spawn (mission: any), adapter client (client: any), and test utilities.
general_conventions.renaming: `Tool as AITool` (4 files) for Vercel AI SDK vs opencode Tool conflict.

backends.opencode_postgres: 16 pgTable() tables via drizzle-orm/pg-core. Drivers: PGlite (in-process) or node-postgres (server). `.pg.sql.ts` suffix.
backends.console_mysql: 26 mysqlTable() tables via drizzle-orm/mysql-core. Driver: planetscale-serverless.
backends.stats_mysql: mysqlTable() tables via drizzle-orm/mysql-core. Driver: planetscale-serverless.
backends.duckdb: Parallel analytics backend via #db-duckdb alias → db.duckdb.ts.

branded_column_types.usage: 41 `.$type<Brand>()` usages on text, jsonb, and json columns for semantic IDs and domain types.
examples: session.pg.sql.ts:19 — `id: text().$type<SessionID>().primaryKey()`
session.pg.sql.ts:34 — `summary_diffs: jsonb().$type<Snapshot.FileDiff[]>()`
session.pg.sql.ts:42 — `revert: jsonb().$type<{ messageID: MessageID; partID?: PartID }>()` — inline object type
coordination.pg.sql.ts:10 — `status: text().notNull().$type<'claimed' | 'released' | 'failed'>()` — literal union

defaults_and_updates.postgres: `integer().notNull().$default(() => Date.now())` + `.$onUpdate(() => Date.now())` via TimestampsPg spread mixin.
defaults_and_updates.mysql: `varchar(...).notNull().defaultNow()` + `sql\`CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3)\`` via timestamps object spread.

3_drizzle_type_patterns.index_patterns: 21+ PG indexes, 20+ MySQL indexes. Single-column, composite (onSession+timeCreated+id), and uniqueIndex patterns used. compound primaryKey() via builder function for join tables (AccountState, ControlAccount, CoordinationFanOut).
3_drizzle_type_patterns.foreign_keys: 12 `.references(() => Table.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' | 'set null' })` — no relations()/one()/many() patterns used. FK-only approach.

patterns: fromRow(row: typeof T.$inferSelect): DomainType — transformation pattern
decode(row: typeof T.$inferSelect) => DomainType — session message decode pattern
NonNullable<(typeof T.$inferInsert)['data']> — insert type with unwrap

upsert_patterns: onConflictDoUpdate with sql`excluded.column` for atomic increments
3_drizzle_type_patterns.re_export_hub: storage/db.ts:5 — `export * from 'drizzle-orm'` — 21+ files import eq/and/desc/sql from @/storage/db

transaction_patterns.effect_adapter: adapter.transaction(async (tx) => ...) — returns Effect, typed errors (DatabaseError, RetriableDatabaseError, FatalDatabaseError), exponential backoff
transaction_patterns.console_nested: Database.use() auto-detects TransactionContext — nests within parent tx or creates standalone
transaction_patterns.transaction_type_debt: Transaction = any at db.ts:57 (deprecated). TxOrDb = Transaction | Client.

3_drizzle_type_patterns.effect_database_adapter: storage/adapter.ts — Context.Service, Layer.effect, DatabaseAdapter with tagged errors, retry/backoff, auto-migration. Abstracts over SQLite/PG/DuckDB via DrizzleLikeClient interface. Pattern: Context.Service + Schema.TaggedErrorClass for error hierarchy.

4_third_party_library_types.vercel_ai_sdk: Mixed runtime/type imports. `Tool as AITool` (4 files). Event type inference: `Result['fullStream'] extends AsyncIterable<infer T> ? T : never`. `LanguageModelV3` from @ai-sdk/provider sub-package.
4_third_party_library_types.effect: 304+ imports. 120 Schema.TaggedErrorClass. 52 Effect.catchTag. 80+ Effect.tryPromise. Zero production catchAll. 3462+ .pipe(). Context.Service pattern. Layer.effect + Layer.suspend. Schema.Struct/Schema.Brand/Schema.Literals/Schema.decodeUnknownOption.
4_third_party_library_types.zod: v3: console core (13 files with fn(schema, handler)), plugin (tool arg inference), enterprise. v4 beta: GitHub Copilot integration.
4_third_party_library_types.vscode: Single `import * as vscode` in sdks/vscode/src/extension.ts:4. Completely isolated. @types/vscode ^1.94.0.
4_third_party_library_types.module_augmentation: solid-js JSX (Directives, IntrinsicElements), virtual:opencode-server (desktop bridge), @solid-primitives/i18n (fix), asset files (.sql/.md/.wav/.mp3/.wasm/.txt), Cloudflare/SST runtime types.

5_existing_utility_types.branded_schema_types: 31 Effect Schema.brand() types — the canonical branding mechanism. No standalone Brand<T> helper. Registry: AbsolutePath, RelativePath, SessionID, ProviderV2.ID, Project.ID, ModelV2.ID, VariantID, Family, AgentV2.ID, Event.ID, AccountV2.ID, ServiceID, Plugin.ID, MessageID, PartID, ProviderID, ModelID, ProjectID, WorkspaceID, ToolID, PtyID, EventID, AccountID, AccessToken, RefreshToken, DeviceCode, UserCode, LLM.ModelID, LLM.ProviderID, DatabaseUrl.

canonical: isRecord(value: unknown): value is Record<string, unknown> — util/record.ts:1 — imported by 8+ files
unknown_to_typed_narrowing.local_isRecord_variants: 12 local reimplementations across desktop, app, opencode, stats. Convergence opportunity.

common_type_utilities: DeepPartial<T> — projectors.ts:22 — T extends object ? { [K in keyof T]?: DeepPartial<T[K]> | null } : T
DeepMutable<T> — core/schema.ts:49 — strips readonly recursively, Function bailout
optionalOmitUndefined<S> — core/schema.ts:23 — Schema transform omitting undefined optionals
NotPromise<T> — db.ts:122 — T extends Promise<any> ? never : T — enforces sync transaction callbacks
Schema.Schema.Type<typeof S> + Types.DeepMutable — standard Schema→TS derivation pattern
result_either_types: IpcResult<T> = IpcOk<T> | IpcErr — desktop IPC contract
Ok<T> / Err<C, T> + InstallResult, ManifestResult, PatchResult — plugin installation
TypedToolResult<T> with status: ToolStatus and errorKind? — tool execution result

error_types.tagged_error_classes: 168 Schema.TaggedErrorClass instances — canonical Effect errors with string tags. Caught via Effect.catchTag(). Key files: tool/tool.ts (5), provider/provider.ts (5), authority.ts (4 + union), workspace.ts (6), repository-cache.ts (6), storage/adapter.ts (3), campaign/secretary.ts (2).
error_types.named_errors: 29 NamedError.create instances — non-Effect factory. Supports NamedError.isInstance() type guard. Key files: session/message-v2.ts (3), session/message-error.ts (2), config/error.ts (2), db.ts (1), markdown.ts (1).
error_types.plain_error_classes: 7 plain extends Error classes: DuckDBError, DatabaseInitError, DuckDBWriteError, DuckDBFirewallError, BinderError, RunFailedError, NotFound.
error_types.discriminated_unions: 5 error union types: AuthorityError, DefaultModelError, AccountError, LockError, Shared (message errors).

6_tsconfig_strictness.summary: 28 packages: all strict: true. 12 explicit, 16 inherited from @tsconfig/bun (ESNext) or @tsconfig/node22 (ES2022). Only github/ sets noUncheckedIndexedAccess: true. 7 packages explicitly set false. useUnknownInCatchVariables: defaults to true everywhere (never explicitly set).
6_tsconfig_strictness.lint_rules: Only 1 ESLint config in entire repo: sdks/vscode/eslint.config.mjs. Minimal rules (naming-convention, curly, eqeqeq, no-throw-literal, semi). NO rules for no-explicit-any, strict-boolean-expressions, switch-exhaustiveness-check, no-floating-promises, consistent-type-imports. Project uses tsgo --noEmit for type checking.

7_smoking_guns_and_debt.finding: Transaction = any is documented debt — affects entire DB layer
Storage adapter uses (client: any) in transaction type — double any with Transaction = any
16 catch (e: any) — 2 in console/ unsafely access .message on any
2 unsafe as Error casts without instanceof guard
Machine spawn uses mission: any — untyped mission propagation
Bus wildcard callbacks use any (3 locations)
12 local isRecord reimplementations — converge on util/record.ts
No lint guardrails — only 1 ESLint config (sdks/vscode) with minimal rules

8_convention_verdicts.catch_clauses: Unannotated `catch (e)` → unknown via strict. Narrow with instanceof Error (170+). Centralized: errorFormat/errorMessage. Effect: catchTag (52x), tryPromise (80+), zero catchAll.
8_convention_verdicts.callbacks: Explicitly typed params. unknown > void for returns. any only in wildcard bus, CLI, machine spawn, adapter client. Rename: Tool as AITool. Effect.fn/EffectBridge for Effect callbacks.
8_convention_verdicts.drizzle: pgTable()/mysqlTable() with .$type<>() (41x). Dot-access .$inferSelect. fromRow()/decode()/hydrate() patterns. TimestampsPg/Timestamps spread mixin. Transaction = any debt (2 locations). EffectDatabaseAdapter with tagged errors/retry. No relations() — FK-only via references().
8_convention_verdicts.branding: Schema.brand('Name') in Effect (31 types). .$type<Brand>() in Drizzle (41 usages). No standalone Brand<T>.
8_convention_verdicts.error_creation: Dual: Schema.TaggedErrorClass (168x, Effect) + NamedError.create (29x, non-Effect). Both produce discriminated/taggable errors. 5 error union types.
8_convention_verdicts.unknown_narrowing: isRecord (canonical + 12 local). Schema.is for Effect types. NamedError.isInstance for factory errors. 14+ specialized type guards (isJsonSchema, isZodType, isPluginTool, etc.).
8_convention_verdicts.type_derivation: Schema.Schema.Type<typeof S> + Types.DeepMutable → TS types. NonNullable for optionals. fromRow/decode for Drizzle→domain.
8_convention_verdicts.effect_vs_native: Effect in opencode src/ (services, schemas, errors, effects). Native try/catch in desktop/console. EffectBridge bridges the boundary (bind, fork, runtime).

9_quick_reference_by_need.type_catch_variable_safely: Omit annotation (strict→unknown). Narrow: instanceof Error, errorFormat(), errorMessage(), isRecord(), Schema.is(). NEVER (e as Error).message without instanceof.
9_quick_reference_by_need.define_drizzle_table: pgTable()/mysqlTable(). .$type<Brand>() for IDs. ...TimestampsPg or ...timestamps mixin. .pg.sql.ts/.sql.ts suffix. Re-export from schema barrel.
9_quick_reference_by_need.extract_drizzle_types: typeof Table.$inferSelect (dot access). fromRow() for transformation. decode() for messages. NonNullable for nested optionals.
9_quick_reference_by_need.create_effect_service: interface Interface { ... }. class Service extends Context.Service<Service, Interface>()('tag') {}. Layer.effect(Service, Effect.gen(...)). Layer.suspend(() => layer.pipe(Layer.provide(...))).
9_quick_reference_by_need.define_typed_error: Effect: Schema.TaggedErrorClass<Name>()('tag', {fields}). Non-Effect: NamedError.create('Name', {fields}). Catch: Effect.catchTag('tag', handler) | NamedError.isInstance(e, name).
9_quick_reference_by_need.narrow_unknown_value: isRecord(value) for Record. Schema.is(Schema)(value) for Effect types. Schema.decodeUnknownOption(Schema)(value) for safe parsing to Option. NamedError.isInstance(error, name) for NamedError.
9_quick_reference_by_need.pass_callback: Explicitly type param. Return unknown (not void) for discarded. Return Effect.Effect for effectful. Rename conflicts: Tool as AITool, Provider as SDK. Bridge sync→Effect: EffectBridge.bind(fn).
9_quick_reference_by_need.run_transaction: Sync: Database.transaction((db) => { ... }). Effect: adapter.transaction(async (tx) => ...). Effect adapter provides retry/backoff + DatabaseError/RetriableDatabaseError/FatalDatabaseError tagging. Console: Database.use nests automatically.
9_quick_reference_by_need.handle_db_migration: opencode: drizzle.config.pg.ts → ./migration-pg. console: drizzle.config.ts → ./migrations/. stats: drizzle.config.ts → ./migrations/. Runtime: adapter auto-migrates on init. PGlite runs SQL via client.query().
